exploration_notes: Added FlagExists(ctx, req) (bool, error) to the ReadOnlyFlagStore interface and implemented it in all 5 concrete types. The interface change is in internal/storage/storage.go. Implementations: (1) fs/snapshot.go does a direct map lookup for efficiency; (2) fs/store.go delegates through the viewer pattern like other methods; (3) sql/common/flag.go uses a lightweight SELECT 1 ... LIMIT 1 query instead of GetFlag's full scan with variants; (4) common/store_mock.go uses testify mock. The sql/sqlite,
